designConstraints: Single-column focused layout with max content width of 1280px, centered with 24px margins on desktop
8px grid system for all spacing — use scale values: 4, 8, 12, 16, 24, 32, 48, 64px
Background: deep-navy (#0F172A) as page background, navy-surface (#1E293B) for card/form surfaces, navy-raised (#293548) for elevated interactive elements
Hero amount input must use heading-1 typography scale (DM Sans, 24px, weight 700) at minimum, scaled up for visual prominence
Category chips and payment method chips must use pill border-radius (9999px) with navy-raised background and slate-border (#334155) default border
Active/selected chip state: gold-amber (#F59E0B) border and subtle gold-amber background tint (opacity subtle: 0.1)
SaveExpenseButton must be full-width, gold-amber (#F59E0B) background, deep-navy (#0F172A) text (text-on-cta), minimum 44px height per touch target spec
Focus ring: 2px solid gold-amber (#F59E0B) with 2px offset on all interactive elements
Disabled state opacity: 0.38 for inactive controls
Elevation level 1 (0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)) for form section cards; elevation level 2 (0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.4)) for MiniCalendarDropdown and SettingsDialog overlays
Z-index: dropdown=1000 for MiniCalendarDropdown, modal=1200 for SettingsDialog
Motion: fast (150ms) for chip selection state transitions, normal (300ms) for calendar dropdown open/close, using default easing cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1)
Maximum 3 levels of visual hierarchy: (1) Hero amount input, (2) Form section groupings (category, date, payment, note), (3) Supporting controls (QuickAdd chips, CharacterCounter, labels)
All interactive touch targets minimum 44px height × 44px width
ColorPickerRow within NewCategoryInlineForm must display color swatches using category color tokens from the Category data model
QuickAddSuggestions chip row displayed above or below the hero input as a horizontal scrollable strip on desktop
NoteInput with CharacterCounter: input surface uses surface-input (deep-navy), border slate-border, focus border gold-amber; counter uses label typography (DM Mono, 12px)
Desktop-first layout at 1440px viewport; tablet breakpoint at 768px collapses to tighter margins (16px) but retains single-column structure
referencePatterns: Hero numeric input pattern: oversized centered amount display with large DM Sans font, cursor-blinking input on dark surface — consistent with premium fintech dashboard identity

Chip grid selection pattern: horizontally wrapping grid of pill-shaped chips with icon+label, single-select with gold-amber active state — mirrors CategoryChipGrid and PaymentMethodChipRow patterns from existing add-expense page spec
Inline form expansion pattern: NewCategoryInlineForm expands inline within the CategoryChipGrid section with ColorPickerRow, avoiding modal interruption
Mini calendar dropdown pattern: DatePickerInput triggers a MiniCalendarDropdown at elevation level 2, z-index 1000, positioned below the trigger input
Quick Add suggestion strip: horizontal scrollable row of QuickAddChip components with merchant emoji, name, and amount — auto-fill pattern that pre-populates all form fields on tap
Full-width CTA button pattern: SaveExpenseButton spans full content column width, gold-amber fill, deep-navy label text — consistent with primary CTA pattern across dashboard and insights pages
Pre-fill edit pattern: all form fields hydrate from existing Expense record when navigated via Edit action from ExpenseDetailPopover on dashboard
TopBar with back navigation: back arrow returns to dashboard, consistent with existing TopBar pattern across all pages
NavigationTabs sticky bottom bar: Home, Add Expense, Insights tabs — consistent across all three pages
Settings dialog overlay: SettingsDialog at elevation level 3, z-index 1200, overlay rgba(0,0,0,0.65)
accessibilityRequirements: WCAG 2.1 AA color contrast ratio of 4.5:1 minimum for all text — silver-text (#CBD5E1) on deep-navy (#0F172A) achieves ~11:1; gold-amber (#F59E0B) on deep-navy achieves ~8.5:1 for CTA label (deep-navy on gold-amber)
AmountHeroInput must have a visible label (visually hidden acceptable) with aria-label='Expense amount' and aria-describedby linking to currency indicator
CategoryChipGrid must be implemented as a radiogroup with role='radiogroup' and aria-label='Select category'; each chip uses role='radio' with aria-checked state
PaymentMethodChipRow must use role='radiogroup' with aria-label='Select payment method'; each chip uses role='radio' with aria-checked state
NewCategoryInlineForm expansion must be announced via aria-live='polite' region so screen readers announce the inline form appearance
ColorPickerRow swatches must have aria-label describing the color name (e.g., 'Select coral red color') and aria-pressed for selected state
DatePickerInput must have aria-label='Expense date' and aria-haspopup='dialog' to indicate calendar dropdown; MiniCalendarDropdown must trap focus when open and support Escape key to close
MiniCalendarDropdown calendar grid must use role='grid' with role='gridcell' for each day, aria-selected for selected date, and aria-label with full date string (e.g., 'June 15, 2024')
NoteInput must have an associated visible or screen-reader label; CharacterCounter must use aria-live='polite' to announce remaining character count on change
SaveExpenseButton must have descriptive aria-label that reflects context: 'Save expense' for new entries, 'Update expense' for edits
QuickAddChip components must have aria-label describing the suggestion (e.g., 'Quick add: Starbucks, $5.50') and be keyboard activatable via Enter and Space
QuickAddSuggestions strip must be navigable via keyboard arrow keys when focused within the strip
All form validation errors must be announced via aria-live='assertive' and associated with the relevant input via aria-describedby
Focus management: when navigating from dashboard Edit action, focus must be placed on AmountHeroInput after pre-fill completes
TopBar back arrow button must have aria-label='Go back to dashboard' with minimum 44×44px touch target
NavigationTabs must use role='tablist' with role='tab' for each tab and aria-current='page' for the active tab
SettingsDialog must use role='dialog' with aria-modal='true', aria-labelledby pointing to dialog title, and focus trap while open
Ensure no content relies solely on color to convey state — selected chips must also show a visible border change or checkmark icon in addition to color
Page must be fully operable via keyboard: Tab, Shift+Tab for focus traversal; Enter/Space for activation; Escape for dismissing dropdowns and dialogs
Respect prefers-reduced-motion: suppress chip selection animations and calendar open/close transitions when user has reduced motion preference enabled
dataModelDependencies: Expense entity — fields: id, amount, merchant, category_id, date, payment_method_id, note, currency; used for pre-filling edit form and submitting new/updated expense via POST /api/expenses or PUT /api/expenses/:id

Category entity — fields: id, name, color_token, color_hex, icon, is_default, sort_order; used by CategoryChipGrid to render category chips and by NewCategoryInlineForm to create new categories via POST /api/categories
PaymentMethod entity — fields: id, name, type, icon, last_four, is_default; used by PaymentMethodChipRow to render payment method chips via GET /api/payment-methods

QuickAddSuggestion entity — fields: id, merchant, amount, category_id, payment_method_id, emoji, frequency, last_used_at; used by QuickAddSuggestions strip to render QuickAddChip components via GET /api/suggestions?limit=4

UserSettings entity — fields: currency, default_monthly_budget, locale; used by AmountHeroInput to display correct currency symbol and by SettingsDialog for settings management via GET /api/settings and PUT /api/settings
